claim_boundary: This is an executable proof-of-method for the macro-constraint protocol, not biological evidence and not a claim that life has been explained.

frozen_objects.G_C: membrane gate preserving macro concentration topology
frozen_objects.X: internal molecule count in finite two-compartment vesicle model
frozen_objects.pi: macro map from count to low / viable / high

forbidden_support.description: Artificial constrained row assigns probability to a lower-law-forbidden transition.

high_cost.description: C changes the macro channel, but the declared cost ledger overwhelms surplus.

no_gate.description: C is identical to K_X; perturbability and surplus must fail.
